name: Interview — Clean
summary: Single-subject seated interview. Tightened with silence removal, kept invisible with soft seam transitions and motion-keyframe reframing so the conversation feels continuous, not chopped.
best_for: Long-form single-person interviews, founder/expert Q&A, podcast video.

pacing.note: Cut on dead air, breaths and filler; each seam should be covered by a reframe or soft transition.

reframe.pattern: Alternate wide <-> punch-in across consecutive sentences to disguise jump points; ease in/out 6-10 frames.
reframe.purpose: Simulate a second camera angle from one source.

transitions.philosophy: Choose the transition that fits the moment; never default to a hard cut.
library: quick film dissolve on topic change
transitions.notes: Use a reframe change on every silence-removal seam; on a topic/segment change use a short dissolve.

color.approach: natural corrective grade, consistent skin tones

audio.note: J/L cuts on every seam so audio carries across the visual change.

generator_rules: Detect speech; remove silence/filler to set cut points.
On each cut, change framing (scale/position) rather than leaving an identical-frame jump.
Bridge audio across seams with short J/L overlaps.
